title: Escalate repeated empty-board guard pauses into a concrete distribution-architecture repair
goal: Stop the marketing loop from reusing distribution_architecture_guard_pause after the same empty-board fingerprint has already looped through repeated guard pauses, and force a real repair path instead.

changes.summary: Added repeated-guard-pause escalation so the selector counts same-fingerprint guard-pause reuse across the recent fallback window and promotes the lane to distribution_architecture_repair instead of another guard pause.
Added regression coverage for repeated guard-pause escalation and updated guard-pause fixtures to use the selector's normalized execution-board fingerprint helper.

result: Live selector probe at 2026-05-26T13:02:00 now returns distribution_architecture_repair instead of distribution_architecture_guard_pause.
Latest persisted lane decision was refreshed at 2026-05-26T13:19:30+02:00 and now points to distribution_architecture_repair.

current_truth.execution_board_state: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the active review window
current_truth.previous_bad_state: selector kept surfacing distribution_architecture_guard_pause even after 19 prior guard pauses on the same fingerprint
